collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (6 total Queries, 6 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT *, `admission_id`, CONCAT( UPPER(LEFT(last_name, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTRING(last_name, 2)), ', ', UPPER(LEFT(first_name, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTRING(first_name, 2)), ' ', UPPER(LEFT(middle_name, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTRING(middle_name, 2)) ) AS full_name, CONCAT('Laguna, ', ' ', `municipality`, ', ', `barangay`, ', ', street) AS address FROM `admissions` WHERE `admission_id` = '169' LIMIT 1

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT *, `admission_id`, CONCAT( UPPER(LEFT(last_name, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTRING(last_name, 2)), ', ', UPPER(LEFT(first_name, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTRING(first_name, 2)), ' ', UPPER(LEFT(middle_name, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTRING(middle_name, 2)) ) AS full_name, CONCAT('Laguna, ', ' ', `municipality`, ', ', `barangay`, ', ', street) AS address FROM `admissions` WHERE `admission_id` = '169' LIMIT 1
